generated_oml:
namespace base "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab "http://example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical gantry crane structure for laboratory research and education"
]
instance PhysicalController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller system managing crane operations"
]
instance HorizontalCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling horizontal cart movement with mechanical limits and safety interlocks"
]
instance VerticalHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling vertical hoist movement with mechanical limits and safety interlocks"
]
instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for container pickup and placement"
]
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interface connecting physical actuators to control system"
]
instance ArduinoSensorNode : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino-based sensor node aggregating data from Swing Angle Encoder and Anemometer at high sampling frequencies"
]
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures load swing dynamics of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time wind speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance DynamicPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted dynamic behavior for simulation and validation"
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational data for analysis and validation"
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of system state for monitoring"
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories for efficient crane operation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance OperatorNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notifies operators via dashboard for appropriate action during continuous validation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal movement trajectories for crane operation",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts dynamic behavior for simulation and validation",
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicPredictionInsight
]
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores and retrieves historical operational data for analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays real-time system state through interactive visualization",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures model accuracy against physical system and notifies operators via dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorNotificationAction
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage for historical data logging",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]
instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for deployment",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService
]
instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib module for C4 container implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService, SimulationService
]
instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of system state",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]
instance MosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time communication via MQTT protocol",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Load swing dynamics data from Swing Angle Encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed monitoring data from Anemometer",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]
instance GantryCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of gantry structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion dynamics of gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and education on digital twin applications",
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, PhysicalController, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoSensorNode, HorizontalCartMotor, VerticalHoistMotor, Electromagnet, PhysicalCraneInterface
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Control Application (Python) are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization, utilizes containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment, and adopts an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulation outputs, calculates distance metrics between actual and predicted states, and triggers operator alerts when deviations exceed a predefined threshold to ensure model fidelity and enable error correction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs an MQTT broker for inter-service communication among digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard C4 containers containerized using Docker. Computational and storage requirements are met locally, and scalability is limited to single-node configuration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the C4 Model standard for software architecture visualization and description as specified in the documentation, with no other industry standards or compliance frameworks mentioned."
]
